description: New WithBrowserLogs() API attaches a tracked browser resource to any endpoint-capable resource. Aspire launches a Chromium-based browser, streams console logs, network requests, and errors back into the resource log stream. A new BrowserUserDataMode (Shared or Isolated) separates user data directory from browser profile, using persistent Aspire-managed browser hives and enabling session adoption across AppHost restarts.
name: Browser log and network capture with WithBrowserLogs()
